creator: uqs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Urgh, I'm so sorry folks. I was 100% sure that I had updated the system to 12-STABLE. Turns out I was mistaken. :(

After the update to 12.1-STABLE the audio driver attaches, as well as acpi_ibm. I probably need a new i915kms module, as it crashes on load, but my poudriere box is lagging behind.

Sorry for the noise :(

Wifi is of course still blocked on bug #227044 though.
